final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: character-expression-sheet
Asset type: 3x3 grid character reference sheet
Primary request: nine-panel expression grid of Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) from Chinese Paladin (仙剑奇侠传), each panel showing a different expression and outfit, all peeking through torn holes in white paper
Scene/backdrop: clean white background with nine torn circular holes arranged in 3x3 grid, each hole framing the character's face
Subject: Zhao Ling'er (赵灵儿) - young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses, consistent facial features across all panels
Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar style, character expression sheet
Composition/framing: 3x3 grid layout, close-up portrait framing for each panel, consistent head size and angle
Lighting/mood: soft even studio lighting, cheerful and expressive mood
Color palette: varied outfit colors - green, red, yellow, black/white, orange, blue, purple, pink, teal - against clean white paper background
Materials/textures: smooth 3D rendered skin, fabric textures for different outfits, torn paper edges with slight shadow depth
Text (verbatim): "赵灵儿"
Constraints: maintain consistent character likeness across all 9 panels, preserve Zhao Ling'er's recognizable features from the IP
Avoid: deformed facial features, inconsistent character appearance between panels, realistic photography style, watermark
